name: Pork with Almond Crust
recipeIngredient: 6 pork loin cutlets -- pound 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together the eggs and buttermilk.
2. In another bowl, combine the flour, cracker crumbs, almonds, salt, cayenne pepper, and coriander.
3. Dip each pounded cutlet into the egg mixture, then dredge them in the flour mixture, pressing to ensure even breading.
4. Place the cutlets on a baking sheet and refrigerate for at least 1 hour. The marinade can be prepared up to 24 hours in advance.
5. Heat butter and olive oil in a large skillet until hot enough to "sing."
6. Cook the cutlets 3 at a time, turning as necessary, for about 3 to 4 minutes per side, or until golden brown.
7. Drain on paper towels.
8. Sprinkle with sliced green onions and serve with lemon wedges.
Yield: 6 servings
